actions.script: var el = document.querySelector('div[contenteditable="true"][translate="no"].tiptap.ProseMirror') || document.querySelector('div.tiptap.ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"]') || document.querySelector('div[contenteditable="true"].tiptap') || document.querySelector('div.ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"]'); if (!el) throw new Error('prompt input not found'); el.innerHTML = ''; var p = document.createElement('p'); p.textContent = '${message}'; el.appendChild(p); el.focus(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); var btn = document.querySelector('button[type="submit"][aria-label="Submit"]') || document.querySelector('button[aria-label="Submit"]') || document.querySelector('button[type="submit"].group.rounded-full'); if (!btn) throw new Error('send button not found'); btn.click(); return 'message_sent';

await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 5000)); var prev = ''; var stable = 0; for (var i = 0; i < 60; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); var els = document.querySelectorAll('div.response-content-markdown.markdown'); if (els.length === 0) { els = document.querySelectorAll('div.response-content-markdown p'); } if (els.length === 0) { els = document.querySelectorAll('p.break-words[dir="auto"]'); } if (els.length > 0) { var txt = els[els.length - 1].innerText || ''; if (txt.length > 0 && txt === prev) { stable++; if (stable >= 2) { return txt; } } else { stable = 0; prev = txt; } } } return prev || '';
